name: Shopping List
summary: A shopping list on your glasses, checked off with the R08 ring.
description: See your shopping list on the glasses HUD as a card and tick items off with the R08 ring. Add or remove items on the phone, or paste a whole list from another app and each line becomes an item.
author: Volund

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

A headless Rokid Nexus plugin that shows your shopping list on the glasses HUD as a card. Walk the list with the R08 ring: move the cursor, tap to check an item off, back to close. Manage the list on the phone — add, remove, clear checked, or paste a multi-line list from another app to import every line at once.

releases.notes:
- HUD card surface listing items, navigable by the R08 ring (move / check / back).
- Phone-side manager: add, remove, clear checked, and multi-line paste import (one item per line).
- Pure, unit-tested state machine and paste parser.

### Artifact

- File: `shoplist-phone-release.apk`
